definitions: n. （尤指船只失事后的）残骸，沉船

examples.text: The discovery was cause for celebration. The artifacts indicated the divers had likely found the wreck of La Trinité, a 16th-century French vessel that had been at the center of a bloody battle between France and Spain that changed the fate of the United States of America.
examples.explanation: 这里的 wreck 指“失事船只的残骸”或“沉船”。句子说：这些文物表明，潜水员很可能找到了“拉三一号”（La Trinité）的沉船遗骸，这是一艘16世纪的法国船只，曾处于一场改变了美国命运的法西血战中心。

reviewSessions.example_text: The discovery was cause for celebration. The artifacts indicated the divers had likely found the wreck of La Trinité, a 16th-century French vessel that had been at the center of a bloody battle between France and Spain that changed the fate of the United States of America.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，结合例句中船只语境，wreck 表示“沉船/失事船只的残骸”。
matched_points: 符合例句中指代船只失事遗迹的含义
